article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC Assessment updates 2026 property values for railways, pipelines, power lines, and telecom cables
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has updated the rules used to calculate the assessed value (the official dollar value used to set property taxes) of railway tracks, pipelines, power lines, and telecom cables in BC for 2026.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
